creator: Mark_Andrews@isc.org
text:
portupgrade -f x11-servers/xorg-server fails as it attempts to make a directory where a symbolic link exists.

How-To-Repeat: Making install in cw
Making install in os
Making install in randr
test -z "/usr/local/include/xorg" || /usr/ports/x11-servers/xorg-server/work/xor
g-server-1.2.0/install-sh -d "/usr/local/include/xorg"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'randrstr.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/randrstr
.h'
Making install in render
test -z "/usr/local/include/xorg" || /usr/ports/x11-servers/xorg-server/work/xor
g-server-1.2.0/install-sh -d "/usr/local/include/xorg"
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'picture.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/picture.h
'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'mipict.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/mipict.h'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'glyphstr.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/glyphstr
.h'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'picturestr.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/pictur
estr.h'
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 'renderedge.h' '/usr/local/include/xorg/render
edge.h'
Making install in Xi
Making install in xkb
test -z "/usr/local/share/X11/xkb/compiled" || /usr/ports/x11-servers/xorg-serve
r/work/xorg-server-1.2.0/install-sh -d "/usr/local/share/X11/xkb/compiled"

UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=xorg-server-1.2.0_2,1 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=1.2
.0_2,1 make -DFORCE_PKG_REGISTER reinstall
